character.name: Nothing in hands
character.prompt:
A huge undead pirate cook / quartermaster with a heavy fat body, thick arms, and a brutal ship-galley look. He has a pale scarred belly exposed under a torn open vest, dirty bloodstained apron cloth, ragged trousers, one heavy boot and one bare wrapped foot. His face is grim and sea-rotted, with a dark beard, hollow eyes, red bandana, and weathered undead skin.

He carries a large bloodstained cleaver as his main weapon and has a metal ladle hanging as a secondary tool. Around his belt are seasoning bottles, spice pouches, ration bags, hooks, jars, rope, and small supply tools. His silhouette should read as a big dangerous pirate cook: bulky, greasy, cursed, practical, and built for feeding a crew or butchering enemies.

Style: gritty dark gothic pirate pixel art, late-SNES inspired, deep maroon, tarnished gold, moonlit teal shadows, bone-white skin highlights, worn leather browns, black background, strong readable sprite silhouette.
